package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIteration() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_linked_list_for_cache_iteration"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag container/list use in cache iteration paths where slices or maps would improve locality."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
